how_computed: Percentage of gold (slug x category x label) cases where the agent's harness-observed status class equals the gold observed status class. A case the agent did not emit (its request was never sent -> observed 'none'/absent) counts as a mismatch. Denominator = all gold cases (457 across 22 endpoints).
rationale: All four agents send to the same local DummyJSON, so the raw Null & Empty Validation Accuracy (how often the API's real behavior matches the idealized null/empty contract) is a property of the API, not the agent — empirically ~36% because DummyJSON validates auth/login but performs no null/empty validation on resource add/update routes (the genuine QA finding). Fidelity-to-gold instead measures each framework's TEST-CONSTRUCTION quality: did it build the full matrix (7 absent/empty states per required field, 6 per optional field, all/each/pairwise-or-half null combinations, the string-"null" probe) with byte-correct bodies, and faithfully exercise every case so its observed token reproduces gold. The headline accuracy + the two task sub-metrics (Required Invalid-State Rejection Rate, Optional Nullable Compliance Rate) are still emitted by every agent as the QA finding.
pass_threshold: fidelity = 100% (agent reproduces every gold observed token)
fail_condition: fidelity < 100% (any case uncovered or any body mis-constructed so the observed token diverges from gold)
